items.title: Parkinson: Wrexham to take promotion 'to the wire'
items.summary: Manager Phil Parkinson underlined Wrexham's determination to take their Championship play-off push "to the wire" after beating Stoke got them back on track.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Can You Bet on Wrestlemania 42?
items.summary: Wondering if you can bet on WWE's biggest event? We have the answer for you.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Malinga, Reddy sink CSK chase to defend under-par 194 in Hyderabad
items.summary: Abhishek Sharma's blazing 59 off 22 balls set up SRH's win as CSK continued to falter in 190-plus chases
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
